allowed_runtime_inputs: audit/evaluation targets for offline validation only
forbidden_runtime_shortcuts: gold target boxes for filtering model outputs
offline labels for runtime selector decisions

evaluation_modes.target_level_model_output: Used for public-raster symbols and image-only family boxes.
evaluation_modes.expected_json_replay: Used only for contains-relation policy validation.
evaluation_modes.negative_probe: Used for selector/compressor bottleneck analysis without runtime adoption.

pipeline_blocks.name: Input normalization
pipeline_blocks.purpose: Prepare raster/image inputs and record IDs for traceable expert outputs.

pipeline_blocks.name: Family experts
pipeline_blocks.purpose: Generate boundary, space, symbol, and text candidates or masks.

pipeline_blocks.name: Policy handoff
pipeline_blocks.purpose: Select opt-in policies under frozen baselines and explicit promotion gates.

pipeline_blocks.name: Relation layer
pipeline_blocks.purpose: Apply relation policies under clearly separated runtime or replay modes.

pipeline_blocks.name: Audit layer
pipeline_blocks.purpose: Compute locked metrics, deltas, failure buckets, and claim boundaries.

figure_spec.title: Audit-gated MoE runtime contract and policy handoff
panels: A: runtime inputs and forbidden shortcuts
C: policy registry and opt-in gates
D: evaluation modes and claim boundaries
figure_spec.caption_draft: The proposed pipeline separates model-output experts, opt-in policy handoff, relation replay, and offline audit gates. This prevents expected-json or target-level evidence from being mistaken for runtime end-to-end scene-graph robustness.

claim_boundaries_to_repeat: 74-row overlay subset for public-raster symbol target-level metrics
61-row image-only target-level diagnostics for multifamily boxes
expected-json/oracle replay only for contains relation policy
P123/P124 selector/compressor probes failed at least one gate and are not runtime defaults
